title: bursera penicillata
intro: Bursera penicillata, also known as the "Ocopa" or "Copal tree," is a medicinal plant native to the Andean region of South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Bursera penicillata include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Bursera penicillata is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
